login.caption: Tap the button below to sign in. If you log out of the Stikup web app, just send /login here and follow the link to sign back in. The link is valid for 5 minutes.

open.caption: Welcome to StikUp! Tap the button below to open the app and start making stickers.

errors.no_profile: Sorry, I couldn't read your Telegram profile.
errors.no_chat_info: Sorry, I couldn't read your chat info.

queue.working_on_it: ⏳ Working on it. I'll send the stickers as soon as they're ready.

link.success: ✅ Your Telegram account is now connected to Stikup.
link.conflict: This Telegram account is already linked to a different Stikup account.
link.expired: This connection request has expired or is invalid. Please try again from the app.
link.failed: Sorry, something went wrong connecting your account. Please try again.

referral.unlocked: 🎉 Someone joined through your link — all 12 stickers in your pack are now unlocked!
